segments.text: MAN: Hello. Do you mind if I ask you some questions about your journey today?
segments.translation: 男：您好。您介不介意我问您一些关于今天的旅行的问题？

segments.text: We're doing a customer satisfaction survey.
segments.translation: 我们正在做客户满意度调查。

segments.text: SOPHIE: Yes. OK. I've got about ten minutes before my train home leaves.
segments.translation: 苏菲：没问题。你问吧。十分钟后我要搭乘火车回家。

segments.text: I'm on a day trip.
segments.translation: 我参加的是一日行。

segments.text: MAN: Great. Thank you. So first of all, could you tell me your name?
segments.translation: 男：太好了。谢谢您。首先，请问您叫什么名字？

segments.text: SOPHIE: It's Sophie Bird.
segments.translation: 苏菲：我叫苏菲·伯德

segments.text: MAN: Thank you. And would you mind telling me what you do?
segments.translation: 男：谢谢。请问您可以告诉我您的职业吗？

segments.text: SOPHIE: I'm a journalist.
segments.translation: 苏菲：我是个记者。

segments.text: MAN: Oh really? That must be interesting.
segments.translation: 男：真的吗？那一定很有趣。

segments.text: SOPHIE: Yes. It is.
segments.translation: 苏菲：是的。的确是这样。

segments.text: MAN: So was the reason for your visit here today work?
segments.translation: 男：您今天来这里是为了工作吗？

segments.text: SOPHIE: Actually, it's my day off.
segments.translation: 苏菲：实际上，今天我休班。

segments.text: I came here to do some shopping.
segments.translation: 我来这里是为了购物。

segments.text: MAN: Oh right.
segments.translation: 男：知道了。

segments.text: SOPHIE: But I do sometimes come here for work.
segments.translation: 苏菲：但是我偶尔到这里工作。

segments.text: MAN: OK. Now I'd like to ask some questions about your journey today, if that's OK.
segments.translation: 男：嗯。现在如果可以的话，我想问您一些关于今天旅行的问题。

segments.text: SOPHIE: Yes. No problem.
segments.translation: 苏菲：你说吧。没问题。

segments.text: MAN: Right, so can you tell me which station you're travelling back to?
segments.translation: 男：好的，您能告诉我您要回到哪个车站吗？

segments.text: SOPHIE: Staunfirth, where I live.
segments.translation: 苏菲：斯当佛斯，我在那里住。

segments.text: MAN: Can I just check the spelling? S-T-A-U-N-F-I-R-T-H?
segments.translation: 男：请问是这么拼吗？S-T-A-U-N-F-I-R-T-H，对吗?

segments.text: SOPHIE: That's right.
segments.translation: 苏菲：是的。

segments.text: MAN: And you travelled from there this morning?
segments.translation: 男：您是这个早上过来的吗？

segments.text: SOPHIE: Yes.
segments.translation: 苏菲：是的。

segments.text: MAN: OK, good. Next, can I ask what kind of ticket you bought?
segments.translation: 男：好的，知道了。接下来，能问下您买的哪种票吗？

segments.text: I assume it wasn't a season ticket, as you don't travel every day.
segments.translation: 我猜不是季票，因为您也不是每天都来。

segments.text: SOPHIE: That's right. No, I just got a normal return ticket.
segments.translation: 苏菲：是的。我买的就是普通的往返票。

segments.text: I don't have a rail card so I didn't get any discount.
segments.translation: 我没有铁路卡所以没有打折。

segments.text: I keep meaning to get one because it's a lot cheaper.
segments.translation: 我一直想要弄一张因为那样会便宜很多。

segments.text: MAN: Yes - you'd have saved 20% on your ticket today.
segments.translation: 男：是的。如果有的话，您的票价今天可以打八折。

segments.text: So you paid the full price for your ticket?
segments.translation: 所以您买的是全价票了？

segments.text: SOPHIE: I paid £23.70.
segments.translation: 苏菲：我花了23.70磅。

segments.text: MAN: OK. Do you think that's good value for money?
segments.translation: 男：知道了。您觉得物有所值吗？

segments.text: SOPHIE: Not really. I think it's too much for a journey that only takes 45 minutes.
segments.translation: 苏菲：并没有。我觉得对于一趟只有45分钟的行程来说太贵了。

segments.text: MAN: Yes, that's one of the main complaints we get.
segments.translation: 男：是的，我们收到的最多的抱怨也是这个。

segments.text: So, you didn't buy your ticket in advance?
segments.translation: 那么，您没有提前买票吗？

segments.text: SOPHIE: No. I know it's cheaper if you buy a week in advance but I didn't know I was coming then.
segments.translation: 苏菲：没有。我知道提前一周买票会更便宜但是我那时候并不知道我会来。

segments.text: MAN: I know. You can't always plan ahead. So, did you buy it this morning?
segments.translation: 男：了解了。有的事儿很难提前计划。那么，您是今天早上买的票吗？

segments.text: SOPHIE: No, it was yesterday.
segments.translation: 苏菲：不是，是昨天。

segments.text: MAN: Right. And do you usually buy your tickets at the station?
segments.translation: 男：好的。您经常在车站买票吗？

segments.text: SOPHIE: Well, I do usually but the ticket office closes early and I hate using ticket machines.
segments.translation: 苏菲：我确实经常在售票处买票，但是售票处很早就关门。我不喜欢用售票机。

segments.text: I think ticket offices should be open for longer hours.
segments.translation: 我觉得售票处的营业时间应该更长。

segments.text: There's always a queue for the machines and they're often out of order.
segments.translation: 售票机前很多人排队，有时很没有秩序。

segments.text: MAN: A lot of customers are saying the same thing.
segments.translation: 男：很多顾客和您说的一样。

segments.text: SOPHIE: So to answer your question …
segments.translation: 苏菲：至于你刚才的问题。

segments.text: I got an e-ticket online.
segments.translation: 我在网上买的电子票。

segments.text: MAN: OK. Thank you. Now I'd like to ask you about your satisfaction with your journey.
segments.translation: 男：了解了。谢谢您。现在我想问您一些关于旅行满意度的问题。

segments.text: So what would you say you were most satisfied with today?
segments.translation: 今天的旅行您最满意的是什么？

segments.text: SOPHIE: Well, I like the wifi on the train.
segments.translation: 苏菲：火车上提供无线网络，我很喜欢。

segments.text: It's improved a lot. It makes it easier for me to work if I want to.
segments.translation: 网速提高很多。如果我要工作的话也更方便。

segments.text: MAN: That's the first time today anyone's mentioned that.
segments.translation: 男：今天还没有人说到这个。

segments.text: It's good to get some positive feedback on that.
segments.translation: 能得到一些积极的反馈真好。

segments.text: SOPHIE: Mmm.
segments.translation: 苏菲：嗯。

segments.text: MAN: And, is there anything you weren't satisfied with?
segments.translation: 男：今天有什么不满意的吗？

segments.text: SOPHIE: Well, normally, the trains run on time and are pretty reliable but today there was a delay; the train was about 15 minutes behind schedule.
segments.translation: 苏菲：平时火车总是准时到站，这一点很值得信赖。但是今天火车晚点了，晚了15分钟。

segments.text: MAN: OK. I'll put that down.
segments.translation: 男：好的。我会记下来。

segments.text: Now I'd also like to ask about the facilities at this station.
segments.translation: 现在我想知道有关火车站设施的情况。

segments.text: You've probably noticed that the whole station's been upgraded.
segments.translation: 您也许已经注意到了整个火车站已经翻新升级了。

segments.text: What are you most satisfied with?
segments.translation: 您最满意的是什么？

segments.text: SOPHIE: I think the best thing is that they've improved the amount of information about train times etc.
segments.translation: 苏菲：我觉得最好的就是他们增加了有关火车班次时间等等的信息。

segments.text: That's given to passengers - it's much clearer - before there was only one board and I couldn't always see it properly - which was frustrating.
segments.translation: 旅客们看时间看得更清楚了。之前只有一个板子，我经常看不清上面的字，这很令人沮丧。

segments.text: MAN: That's good. And is there anything you're not satisfied with?
segments.translation: 男：那就好。有什么不满意的吗？

segments.text: SOPHIE: Let's see … I think things have generally improved a lot.
segments.translation: 苏菲：我想想。我觉得普遍来说已经完善了很多。

segments.text: The trains are much more modern and I like the new café.
segments.translation: 火车更加现代化了，我也喜欢新的咖啡厅。

segments.text: But one thing is that there aren't enough places to sit down, especially on the platforms.
segments.translation: 但是确实有一个不满意的地方，那就是车站，尤其是站台上的座椅不够。

segments.text: MAN: OK - so I'll put 'seating' down, shall I, as the thing you're least satisfied with?
segments.translation: 男：好的，我把它记成您最不满意的事项？

segments.text: SOPHIE: Yes. OK.
segments.translation: 苏菲：可以。没问题。

segments.text: MAN: Can I ask your opinion about some of the other facilities?
segments.translation: 男：我能问问您对其他设施的看法吗？

segments.text: We'd like feedback on whether people are satisfied, dissatisfied or neither satisfied nor dissatisfied.
segments.translation: 我们希望得到客户的回应，不管是满意还是不满意还是无意见。

segments.text: SOPHIE: OK.
segments.translation: 苏菲：可以。

segments.text: MAN: What about the parking at the station?
segments.translation: 男：车站停车方便吗？

segments.text: SOPHIE: Well to be honest, I don't really have an opinion as I never use it.
segments.translation: 苏菲：说实话，因为我没用过，我也没什么看法。

segments.text: MAN: So, neither satisfied nor dissatisfied for that then.
segments.translation: 男：那就是无意见。

segments.text: SOPHIE: Yes, I suppose so …
segments.translation: 苏菲：是的，我觉得是。

segments.text: MAN: OK, and what about …?
segments.translation: 男：好的，那……
